## QueryResult type

Discriminated wire shape returned by every list endpoint.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type QueryResult<T> = {
    kind: "list";
    items: T[];
    totalCount: number;
    returnedCount: number;
    hasMore: boolean;
    offset: number;
    limit: number;
} | {
    kind: "count";
    count: number;
} | {
    kind: "ids";
    ids: string[];
} | {
    kind: "single";
    item: T | null;
} | {
    kind: "groups";
    groups: {
        key: string;
        count: number;
        items?: T[];
    }[];
    totalCount: number;
};
```
